attacking_style: Explosive late attacker who waits until the final 200m or less to deploy superior sprint power on steep gradient finishes, particularlycat 1 summit conclusions.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Steep gradient cat 1 summit finishes where accelerative power and explosive sprint can be maximized in final meters. Exposed on long-distance attrition battles.
vulnerability: Likely vulnerable when attacks come earlier or when prolonged climbs neutralize late explosive power before the finish.
key_patterns: Only single race observation available - insufficient data for pattern establishment
Demonstrated superior sprint/accelerative power on steep gradients at race conclusion
Breakaway specialist who can finish from reduced groups with late attacks
form_trajectory: unknown: Single race win from breakaway shows capability but insufficient sequential data for trajectory assessment
